---
title: "Augusta Frederica Frere"
---

## Augusta Frederica Frere

**Dates:** (1824-1888)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1865-73)

### Biography

She was the fourth daughter of William Frere (1775-1836), Master of Downing College, Cambridge. [LG 1952]  However, it is not clear whether or not the letter to Miss Frere (1875) who lived abroad, is addressed to her.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 4th 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
